name: TravelCenters of America - TA Mobile #54
description: Full-service TA travel center at I-10 Exit 4 in Grand Bay with a truck service shop, restaurants, and a CAT Scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #846
description: 24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-10 Exit 10 (County Farm Rd) in Irvington offering diesel, showers, fast food, and a CAT Scale.

name: Pilot Travel Center #302
description: Pilot travel center at I-10 Exit 13 (Theodore Dawes Rd) in Theodore with diesel lanes, showers, a Wendy's, and a CAT Scale.

name: Action Resources - Theodore Tank Wash
description: Tank and trailer wash/cleaning facility off I-10 Exit 13 in Theodore that primarily services tank and chemical trailers.

name: Super 8 by Wyndham Mobile/Tillmans Corner
description: Budget hotel in the Tillmans Corner area just off I-10 that offers large-vehicle/truck parking for overnight drivers.

name: Stop N Shop (Texaco) - Rangeline Rd
description: Small independent Texaco truck stop and convenience store near I-10 in the Tillmans Corner/Rangeline Rd area with a limited number of truck parking spaces and a restaurant.

name: Love's Travel Stop #206
description: Full-service Love's travel center at I-10 Exit 44 (AL-59) in Loxley with diesel lanes, truck parking, showers, an Arby's, and a CAT scale.

name: Oasis Travel Center (TA Express / AmBest)
description: Large independent AmBest travel center (now a TA Express franchise, TA site #0989) at I-10 Exit 53 with covered fuel lanes, 185 parking spaces, the Derailed Diner, showers, and laundry.

name: Oasis Travel Center Truck Wash
description: On-site truck and trailer wash at the Oasis Travel Center off I-10 Exit 53 in Robertsdale.

name: CAT Scale at Love's #206 - Loxley
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the Love's Travel Stop at I-10 Exit 44 (Hwy 59) in Loxley.

name: Love's Truck Care - Loxley
description: Love's Truck Care service bay at the Loxley Love's (I-10 Exit 44) offering tire service, oil/PM, light mechanical work, and 24-hour roadside assistance.

name: All Truck and Trailer, LLC
description: 24/7 heavy-duty towing, mobile repair, and mobile tire service with a 4-bay shop located at I-10 Exit 53 directly behind the Oasis truck stop in Robertsdale.
